name: Build SpectrumApp iOS

on:

  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:

  build:

    runs-on: macos-14

    timeout-minutes: 120

    steps:

    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - uses: actions/setup-python@v5

      with:
        python-version: "3.11"

    - name: Install build tools

      run: |

        python -m pip install --upgrade pip

        pip install \
          cython \
          kivy-ios

    - name: Build native dependencies

      run: |

        toolchain build \
          python3 \
          numpy \
          kivy \
          opencv

    - name: Create iOS project

      run: |

        toolchain create SpectrumApp .

    - name: Copy assets

      run: |

        cp chart.png SpectrumApp-ios/

    - name: Upload project

      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4

      with:

        name: SpectrumApp-iOS

        path: SpectrumApp-ios
